name: Detonate Living
effect: Hit an enemy under the Culling Strike Threshold, causing them to violently explode, damaging surrounding enemies. Highlights enemies under the Culling Strike Threshold.

build_fit.why: Physical culling/finisher. Off-element and marginal for a lightning combo build; clear-only utility.

source: In-game tooltip screenshots 2026-06-07, Runes of Aldur league (patch 0.5)
